/usr/sbin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-quantize.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-quantize.dir/quantize.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-quantize  -Wl,-rpath,/home/milo/projects/go-llama.cpp/build/bin: ../../common/libcommon.a ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.8797 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.11 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.11 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.11 ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
